consumer_electronics.title: Google Home’s Gemini AI can handle more complicated requests
consumer_electronics.summary: Google Home users can now ask Gemini to complete more complex, multi-step tasks and combine multiple tasks in a single command. consumer_electronics.title: Apple agrees to pay iPhone owners $250 million for not delivering AI Siri
consumer_electronics.summary: Apple has agreed to pay $250 million to settle a class action lawsuit that accused it of misleading customers about the availability of its Apple Intelligence features. consumer_electronics.title: Microsoft gives up on Xbox Copilot AI
consumer_electronics.summary: Xbox is "winding down Copilot on mobile" and "will stop development of Copilot on console," new Xbox CEO Asha Sharma announced on Tuesday. consumer_electronics.title: Apple could let you pick a favorite AI model in iOS 27
consumer_electronics.summary: The next update to Apple's operating systems could allow users to choose their preferred AI model for running Apple Intelligence. consumer_electronics.title: Threads is finally getting DMs on the web
consumer_electronics.summary: Nearly a year after rolling out Threads direct messaging to everyone on mobile, Meta is finally bringing the feature to the web. consumer_electronics.title: OpenAI claims ChatGPT’s new default model hallucinates way less
consumer_electronics.summary: OpenAI's newest default model for ChatGPT might not make stuff up as much. Hallucinations have been an ongoing problem for AI models, but OpenAI says its new GPT-5.5 Instant model has "significant improvements in factuality across the board." consumer_electronics.title: Microsoft’s new Xbox shake-up is all about platform changes

channel_news.summary: Anthropologie's wedding business has grown "exponentially" in the last couple of years as brides look for different outfits for all parts of their big day, the brand said.

channel_news.title: How Ace Hardware built its employee AI assistant
channel_news.summary: Ace Hardware is a unique retailer, being a cooperative with more than 5,200 stores that are operated independently. As a result, its executives and development team took a careful approach in designing and implementing its new AI assistant to work throughout the chain.

channel_news.title: How Molly Baz’s Ayoh managed the cost of reformulating its mayonnaise to swap seed oil for avocado oil
channel_news.summary: This month, Ayoh revamped its mayonnaise line with avocado oil, which the company says makes for a creamier and healthier recipe. But that decision came at a cost.

channel_news.title: ‘A shock to the system’: Roughly $300 billion in U.S. imports changed country of origin last year
channel_news.summary: Roughly $300 billion in U.S. imports changed country of origin last year, representing big shifts in where goods were coming from compared to the prior year, according to Kearney's reshoring index.

channel_news.title: Winx Health has tripled its retail revenue in the last three months. Now, it’s launching into Walmart

channel_news.title: Legacy retailers like Party City and Staples are increasingly teaming up on shop-in-shops in a bid for relevance
channel_news.summary: Retailers like Staples and Bed Bath & Beyond are identifying opportunities to scoop up struggling brands — like Party City and The Container Store — and using their name recognition to bring new customers into stores.

channel_news.title: Why Aldi, Walmart and more are redesigning their private-label packaging
channel_news.summary: Major retailers like Target, Walmart and Aldi have recently announced redesigns of their private-label brands. The recent string of rebrands signals new investment in how these products are perceived.

channel_news.title: Retailers are rushing to build AI apps. It’s unclear if shoppers will use them
channel_news.summary: Retailers and brands are launching shopping apps within ChatGPT and Claude at a rapid pace. But whether or not shoppers will embrace them at a rapid pace remains to be seen.
